Package dev.rono.permissions.api.permission

Class PermissionAddRequest

java.lang.Object
dev.rono.permissions.api.permission.PermissionAddRequest
public final class PermissionAddRequest extends Object
Builder request for advanced permission additions (duration, expiry, context, source).
